title: How Marketers Can Use AI to Run a Competitive Analysis in Under a Minute
summary: Not long ago, the work of creating a competitive analysis took weeks of research, strategic frameworks and review. This service could cost $10,000 or more for the analysis plus strategy recommendations. Today with AI, the time (and cost) has shrunk to almost nothing.

title: Protecting Your Work as AI Models Rapidly Come and Go
summary: Marketers, beware: The AI model you rely on today might not be the one you can rely on tomorrow.

title: This Is How Marketers Can Use AI Agents for Data Analysis
summary: Do you think of tools such as OpenAI's Codex or Anthropic's Claude Code as developer tools, built only for writing software? Not the case. A recent project at SmarterX shows how these tools can be repurposed for one of the most common (and tedious) marketing tasks: making sense of messy data.

title: Is There an AI Gap Growing Inside Your Marketing Team?

title: Two Things Every B2B Marketer Should Be Doing With AI Now
summary: Our 2026 State of AI for Business Report surveyed more than 2,100 business professionals, including nearly a third who are marketers and 84% who work for B2B organizations. Respondents said 41% of their organizations describe their AI momentum as inconsistent or siloed. More than half of individual professionals have moved past experimentation, yet their organizations haven't caught up.

title: It’s Time to Use AI as Your Thinking Partner
